[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100001 3
1 10101111 6
2 00011111 5
3 11100101 5
4 11100110 5
5 01010010 3
6 01100001 3
7 10101111 6

67 76 00110011 4
70 07 11110101 6

71 17 01110011 5
